quote: Maypa ang bug, pirmi nimo ginapangita. Ako tawon, kalimtan lang.
english_translation: It's better to be a bug, you always search for it. Me, I'm just forgotten.
author: Anonymous Dev

quote: Ang coding murag gugma, sakit sa ulo pero lami kung mag-work na.
english_translation: Coding is like love, it's a headache but feels good once it works.
author: Cebuano Dev

quote: Commit na, ayaw na pag-expect nga ma-merge ka sa iyang kasing-kasing.
english_translation: Just commit, don't expect to be merged into their heart.
author: Davao Dev

quote: Sige ka'g 'Fixing bugs' pero ang problem sa inyong relasyon, wala gihapon na-fix.
english_translation: You're always 'Fixing bugs' but the problem in your relationship still isn't fixed.
author: Bitter Dev

quote: Dili tanan 'resolved' sa Jira, resolved na sa life.
english_translation: Not everything 'resolved' in Jira is resolved in life.
author: Senior Dev

quote: Deploy na ta sa production, basin didto nimo makit-an ang imong forever.
english_translation: Let's deploy to production, maybe you'll find your forever there.
author: Optimistic Junior

quote: Para kang semicolon, laging nawawala kung kailan kailangan kita.
english_translation: You're like a semicolon, always missing when I need you.
author: Tagalog Dev

quote: Sana ang pag-ibig parang Git, pwedeng i-rollback pag nagkamali.
english_translation: I wish love was like Git, you could rollback when you make a mistake.
author: Modern Pinoy

quote: Hindi lahat ng 'Null' ay walang laman, minsan nandoon ang sakit na hindi mo makita.
english_translation: Not all 'Null' is empty, sometimes that's where the pain you can't see is.
author: Hugot King

quote: Ang pag-ibig ay parang JavaScript, magulo pero kailangan mong intindihin.
english_translation: Love is like JavaScript, it's messy but you have to understand it.
author: JS Enthusiast

quote: Kasla ag-code ti agayat, narigat ngem no ag-run, naimbag.
english_translation: Loving is like coding, it's hard but when it runs, it's good.
author: Ilocano Coder

quote: Ti bug ket kas iti problema ti biag, masapul nga annadam a biroken.
english_translation: A bug is like a life problem, you need to carefully find it.
author: Vigan Dev

quote: Anting pamag-debug ing bie, dakal a errors pero kailangan e ka susuko.
english_translation: Life is like debugging, lots of errors but you shouldn't give up.
author: Pampanga Dev

quote: Ing deploy parang confession, pag sinabi mu na, alang bawian.
english_translation: Deploying is like a confession, once you say it, there's no taking it back.
author: Clark Dev

quote: An code pareho han gugma, kun diri ka mag-try, diri ka mahahingadto.
english_translation: Code is like love, if you don't try, you'll never get there.
author: Tacloban Dev

quote: Diri tanan nga compile, magiging successful ha production.
english_translation: Not everything that compiles will be successful in production.
author: Eastern Visayas Coder

quote: Ang code pareho sa relasyon, kinahanglan mo i-maintain o mawala.
english_translation: Code is like a relationship, you need to maintain it or it falls apart.
author: Iloilo Dev

quote: Wala ka man error, indi buot silingon nga husto na ang code mo.
english_translation: Having no errors doesn't mean your code is correct.
author: Negros Dev

quote: An programming arog kan pagpadagos sa buhay, kaipuhan mong mag-adapt.
english_translation: Programming is like continuing in life, you need to adapt.
author: Naga Dev

quote: Dai mo masasabi na maray an code mo kun dai mo ini na-test.
english_translation: You can't say your code is good if you haven't tested it.
author: Legazpi Coder
